zh.lifeSummary: 當Margarete von Jülich於1350年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福時，她的父親Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg29歲，母親Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg36歲。她於1369年與Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福可列福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1425年10月10日在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫可列福享年75歲。

meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Jülich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto.

variants.name: Juhl
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Arno, Erwin, Heinz, Kurt.

Danish and Norwegian: nickname for someone who was born on Christmas Day or had some other connection with this time of year, from Old Norse jól. This was originally the name of a pagan midwinter festival, which was later appropriated by the Christian Church for celebration of the birth of Christ.
German (of Slavic origin): nickname or topographic name from a Germanized Slavic stem gol ‘naked, barren’.

nameMeanings.name: Margarete
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Margaret
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margarethe
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margarete von Jülich was born in 1350, in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg, was 29 and her mother, Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, was 36. She married Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves in 1369, in Cleves, Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 10 October 1425, in Kleve, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margarete von Jülich est née en 1350, à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves en 1369, à Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1425, à Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margarete von Jülich 1350 in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg 29 und ihre Mutter Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg 36. Sie hat 1369 in Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1425 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Jülich è nata il nel 1350 nel Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves nel 1369, nel Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1425, nel Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margarete von Jülichが1350年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブで生まれた時，父Gerhard I. von Jülich-Bergは29歳，母Margarete von Ravensberg-Bergは36歳であった。1369年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブクレブでAdolph III von der Mark Earl of Clevesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1425年10月10日にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンクレブで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margarete von Jülich(이)가 1350년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 클브에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1369년 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브 클브에서 Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1425년 10월 10일 독일 노르드하이-베스트파렌 클브에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margarete von Jülich nasceu em 1350, em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves em 1369, em Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1425, em Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margarete von Jülich родилась в 1350 г. в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves в 1369 г. в местности клив, клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла 10 октября 1425 г. в местности клив, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margarete von Jülich nació en 1350, en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, su papá, Gerhard I. von Jülich-Berg, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Margarete von Ravensberg-Berg, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Adolph III von der Mark Earl of Cleves en 1369, en Kleve, Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1425, en Kleve, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemania, a la edad de 75 años.
